title: Shiny Netherite
description: Gives a new, shinier, look to netherite!
body:
Makes the Netherite tools feel less heavy by making them shinier, with a bit of a gilded look.

![Pickaxe Imacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e5437380b376c8793013991192368157ae104e.png) A new look to netherite!

![The Sword in the Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9d6c59bfad2a74f0965db4de8f4ee1bf4836d6.png)![The Shovel in the Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae9fe3a60670e8a622538e7af3ad451c1c218ce0.png)
